summary: Emit a stderr warning and reword `--help` when `--sic` is set in `industry-bench`.
reason: The XBRL frame endpoint does not carry SIC codes; deriving them per-CIK via the submissions endpoint would cost thousands of HTTP calls per run. Previously the flag was silently ignored with only `sic_note` in the meta output; now it warns on stderr and the `--help` text states 'NOT APPLIED in v1' unambiguously.
